no-wikipedia:KODE 3.notes: No standalone Wikipedia article exists for KODE 3 specifically in any language. KODE 3 is one of four KODE buildings covered only within the broader umbrella article 'KODE Kunstmuseer og komponisthjem'; the building's Rasmus Meyer collection (Rasmus Meyers samlinger) is merely a redirect into the broader Bergen Kunstmuseum article, so neither qualifies as a same-subject standalone article.
